commit.message:
refactor(symbol): extract magic number into maxFallbackSymbols constant

Extract the hardcoded 4096 symbol limit into a named constant with comprehensive
documentation explaining the rationale:
- Covers typical library sizes (glibc ~2000 symbols, most app libraries <1000)
- Relies on early termination when encountering all-zero entries
- Notes that rare mega-libraries may exceed this but typically provide DT_HASH/DT_GNU_HASH

Improves code clarity and addresses audit finding by documenting why this value
was chosen as the fallback when symbol table size cannot be determined.

Update AUDIT.md to mark this issue as resolved.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[Agent] Skin Catalog Browser: SwiftUI UI for browsing and downloading skins (#2560)

* feat: add Skin Catalog Browser UI (issue #2545)

- SkinCatalogBrowserView: searchable, filterable grid of remote skins
  with system/device filters, sort options, and async thumbnail loading
- SkinCatalogDetailView: full detail view with screenshots carousel,
  metadata stats, and streaming download & install with progress bar
- SystemSkinBrowserView: adds "Get More" toolbar button and
  "Browse Catalog" promo banner linking to the catalog browser

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address Copilot review issues in Skin Catalog Browser

- Fix byte-by-byte file writing in downloadSkin() by buffering
  writes in 64KB chunks to avoid per-byte syscall overhead
- Fix incorrect .animation value parameter: pass downloadState
  directly instead of a boolean expression (downloadState == .idle)
- Update deprecated .onChange(of:) { _ in } to two-parameter
  closure form .onChange(of:) { _, _ in }
- Remove unused @Environment(\.dismiss) from SkinCatalogBrowserView
- Remove unused @State showingSourceLink from SkinCatalogDetailView
- Remove unused @State selectedSystem from SystemSkinBrowserView
- Replace DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter with Task.sleep in async
  contexts for consistent structured concurrency

Part of #2545

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address Copilot review issues in skin catalog views

SkinCatalogDetailView:
- Remove unused @Environment(\.dismiss)
- Replace byte-by-byte URLSession.AsyncBytes download with
  URLSessionDownloadTask + delegate for efficient chunked I/O
- Store download Task in @State; cancel on view disappear
- Add defer block to always clean up temp file on success/failure
- Cache DateFormatter as static let to avoid repeated allocations

SkinCatalogBrowserView:
- Fix loading spinner: drive rotation via @State spinnerRotation
  with a proper repeatForever animation (was static -90deg)
- Apply selectedDevice filter and sortOption locally on search results
  so filters are respected during text search
- Update errorMessage and clear entries in applyFilters() catch block
  so the error UI is shown on filter/search failures
- Cancel in-flight filter Task before starting a new one via
  scheduleFilterUpdate() helper; guard Task.isCancelled after awaits
- Add .accessibilityLabel to filter toggle and refresh toolbar buttons

SystemSkinBrowserView:
- Mark delayed loadSkins() Task as @MainActor to prevent
  "Publishing changes from background threads" warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address Copilot review issues in skin catalog views (round 5)

- Fix critical bug: move downloaded file within didFinishDownloadingTo
  before system deletes it; previously stored stale URL for later use
- Fix URLSession leak: call finishTasksAndInvalidate() in delegate
  didCompleteWithError via defer; pass session ref into delegate
- Remove [self] capture in progressHandler (misleading for value type)
- Add Task.isCancelled guards in downloadAndInstall() before and after
  download, and in the catch block
- Extract formatCount into shared internal function formatSkinDownloadCount
  in SkinCatalogBrowserView.swift; remove duplicate from CatalogSkinCard
  and SkinCatalogDetailView
- Add 300ms debounce in scheduleFilterUpdate to avoid flooding service
  on rapid keystrokes; check Task.isCancelled after sleep
- Wrap navigationBarLeading/Trailing toolbar items in #if !os(tvOS) in
  both SystemSkinBrowserView and SkinCatalogBrowserView to prevent tvOS
  build failures

commit.message:
fix: proper PauseAndRun synchronization, guard ReadPlayerName/ReadSeed from Live

Fixes #1133, #1134

- #1133: Replace Thread.Sleep(100) in PauseAndRun with event-based
  handshake — add _liveIsPausedEvent (ManualResetEventSlim) that the
  Live render loop sets after entering paused state. PauseAndRun now
  waits on this event instead of sleeping, eliminating the timing race
  under CPU load.

- #1134: Guard ReadPlayerName() and ReadSeed() — both use AnsiConsole.Prompt
  which cannot acquire Spectre's DefaultExclusivityMode lock while Live.Start()
  holds it. Add explicit InvalidOperationException guard so these methods fail
  fast with a clear message instead of hanging silently if ever called incorrectly
  after StartAsync(). Both are startup-only operations called before Live starts.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix hardcoded page size assumption in loader

Replace hardcoded 4096-byte page size with dynamic unix.Getpagesize()
in pageDown() and pageUp() functions. This ensures portability to
architectures with different page sizes (e.g., ARM64 with 16KB or 64KB
pages), supporting future aarch64 port (ROADMAP Phase 7.4).

- Use unix.Getpagesize() from golang.org/x/sys/unix (already imported)
- Calculate page mask dynamically instead of hardcoded 4095
- Maintains correct behavior on x86-64 Linux (4KB pages)
- No test regressions or complexity increases

Fixes: AUDIT.md LOW finding - hardcoded page size assumption

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
[kafka receiver config] Replace traces.topic: with traces.topics: (#8144)

`kafkareceiver` v0.147.0 removed the deprecated `topic` field from
`TopicEncodingConfig` (deprecated since v0.142.0), causing the ingester
to fail on startup with `'traces' has invalid keys: topic`.

## Changes

- **`cmd/jaeger/config-kafka-ingester.yaml`** and
**`docker-compose/kafka/jaeger-ingester-remote-storage.yaml`**: Replace
`traces.topic: <value>` with `traces.topics: [<value>]`

```yaml
# Before
receivers:
  kafka:
    traces:
      topic: ${env:KAFKA_TOPIC:-jaeger-spans}

# After
receivers:
  kafka:
    traces:
      topics:
        - ${env:KAFKA_TOPIC:-jaeger-spans}
```

`config-kafka-collector.yaml` is unaffected — it uses `kafkaexporter`,
which retains `SignalConfig.topic` in v0.147.0.

* Use Companion for inserting Pockets

Add toInsertCompanion() to Pocket to produce a PocketsCompanion for inserts (letting the DB auto-increment the id) and update toDb() to require a non-null id for updates (assert and use id!). Replace previous fallback for colorGradient id with a non-null assertion. Update PocketRepository.insertPocket to use the new companion method and tidy up a select formatting. These changes clarify insert vs update flows and prevent accidental use of toDb() for new rows.

* Simplify AsyncNotifier provider and init

Replace the provider closure with a constructor tear-off (PocketViewModel.new) for AsyncNotifierProvider. Remove the explicit constructor and change _pocketRepository from late final to late, assigning it within build() via ref.watch(pocketRepositoryProvider). Minor whitespace cleanup. This aligns initialization with Riverpod's AsyncNotifier pattern so ref can be used during build.

* Load dashboard pockets via Riverpod provider

Convert DashboardScreen to a ConsumerWidget and watch pocketViewModelProvider to load pockets asynchronously. Replaces hardcoded sample Pocket instances with provider-driven data for the Swiper and adds loading, error, and empty-state UI. Adds flutter_riverpod and pocket viewmodel imports, removes unused model imports, and applies a small const optimization to the add Icon.

* Truncate text and scale balance in PocketCard

Prevent layout overflow in PocketCard by adding maxLines and ellipsis to pocket name and purpose, and reducing their font sizes. Wrap the balance Text in a FittedBox (BoxFit.scaleDown, left aligned) so large numbers scale to fit the available space.

* Await pocket creation and refresh list

Make button handlers asynchronous and await navigation/creation operations. In CreatePocketScreen, await createPocket(...) and pop the route if context.mounted to close the screen after creation. In DashboardScreen, await context.push(...) and then call refreshPockets() so the pocket list is updated after returning from the create screen. This avoids race conditions and ensures the UI reflects the new pocket.

commit.message:
perf: tune SQLite pragmas for faster writes in WAL mode (#39)

Add three performance-oriented PRAGMAs to the SQLite connection setup:

- synchronous = NORMAL: eliminates the per-write fsync() that WAL+FULL
  imposes. In WAL mode NORMAL is safe against crashes; only an OS-level
  power loss mid-write could cause data loss, which is acceptable for
  conversation-history data.
- cache_size = -8000: enlarges the page cache to 8 MB (from the 2 MB
  default), reducing repeated I/O on hot session/message rows.
- temp_store = MEMORY: keeps SQLite temporary tables in RAM instead of
  writing them to disk.

Benchmark (file-based SQLite, 2 000 sequential single-commit inserts):
  Before: 0.463 s -> 4 320 writes/sec
  After:  0.039 s -> 51 582 writes/sec  (~12x improvement)

Co-authored-by: Perf Improver <copilot@github.com>
